curation_notes: The patch changes only src/pbkdf2.js (source), grunt/config/modularize.js (build config), and test/pbkdf2-test.js (test). The sole source-level change is in src/pbkdf2.js where the default hasher is changed from SHA1 to SHA256 and the default iteration count from 1 to 250000. The vulnerability class crypto-weakness matches the CWE IDs (CWE-327, CWE-328, CWE-916) and the advisory description — no override needed. No sibling files share the same vulnerability pattern since PBKDF2 is the only key derivation module with these insecure defaults.
